text:
Searched under `clients/src/main/` and `core/src/main/` (plus discovered related modules) for classes/interfaces with 'Authorizer' or 'AclAuthorizer' in their names. Key findings:

**`clients/src/main/` — Interface definitions (ACL authorization API):**
- **`Authorizer`** (interface) — The pluggable authorizer interface for Kafka brokers. Extends `Configurable, Closeable`. Defines `authorize()`, `start()`, `createAcls()`, `deleteAcls()`, `acls()` methods.
- **`AuthorizerServerInfo`** (interface) — Runtime broker config metadata provided to authorizers during startup.
- **`AuthorizerNotReadyException`** (class) — Exception indicating the authorizer isn't ready yet. Extends `RetriableException`.
- Supporting types in `clients/src/main/.../server/authorizer/`: `AclCreateResult`, `AclDeleteResult`, `Action`, `AuthorizableRequestContext`, `AuthorizationResult`.

**`core/src/main/` — No Java files with 'Authorizer' or 'AclAuthorizer' in class name.** The old ZooKeeper-based `AclAuthorizer` has been removed in this version. The only ACL-related file is `AclApis.scala` (Scala, handles ACL API requests).

**`metadata/src/main/` — Implementation (KRaft-based ACL authorizer):**
- **`ClusterMetadataAuthorizer`** (interface) — Extends `Authorizer`. For authorizers storing state in `__cluster_metadata` log.
- **`StandardAuthorizer`** (class) — Implements `ClusterMetadataAuthorizer, Monitorable`. Built-in authorizer that stores ACLs in the metadata log.
- **`StandardAuthorizerData`** (class) — Internal data structure holding ACL state for `StandardAuthorizer`.
- **`StandardAcl`** (class) — A Kafka ACL identified by UUID, stored in the metadata log.
- **`AclMutator`** (interface) — Interface for ACL create/delete operations used by `ClusterMetadataAuthorizer`.
- **`AclPublisher`** (class) — Publishes ACL metadata changes to the authorizer.

**`server/src/main/` and `server-common/src/main/` — Utilities:**
- **`AuthorizerUtils`** (class) — Utility to create an `Authorizer` instance from a class name.
- **`KafkaAuthorizerServerInfo`** (class) — Implements `AuthorizerServerInfo` interface.

The inheritance chain is: `Authorizer` (interface) → `ClusterMetadataAuthorizer` (extends Authorizer) → `StandardAuthorizer` (implements ClusterMetadataAuthorizer). No `AclAuthorizer` class exists in this codebase version (the ZK-based implementation was removed).
